channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: This CEO sells low-cost drugs, and he says Big Pharma might not be the true adversary
item.description: For many Americans, pharmaceutical drugs are too expensive—and thanks to a system of complex and tedious bureaucracy, any effort for meaningful reform has been futile. Cost Plus Drugs wants to change that.
item.dc:creator: Robert Safian, Fast Company

item.title: Sam Altman brushes off Musk's influence in Trump administration amid tension
item.description: Sam Altman, the CEO of tech company OpenAI, brushed off tech billionaire Elon Musk's influence in the upcoming Trump administration, according to a Wednesday report from The New York Times.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, The Hill

item.title: District of Columbia says Amazon secretly stopped fast deliveries to 2 predominantly Black zip codes
item.description: The District of Columbia sued Amazon on Wednesday, alleging the company secretly stopped providing its fastest delivery service to residents of two predominantly Black neighborhoods while still charging millions of dollars for a membership that promises the benefit.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: OpenAI's Sam Altman 'not that worried' about rival Elon Musk's influence in the Trump administration
item.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, who is in a legal dispute with rival Elon Musk, said he is “not that worried” about Musk's influence in the incoming Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Hackers are building bespoke Mac malware using GenAI
item.description: The idea that macOS is safer than Windows is a dated one thanks to generative AI and its impact on malware writing.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra predicted colors: every rumored shade
item.description: We're expecting the Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra to be sold in seven shades, and we have a good idea of what they'll be.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: The Unconventional Job Perks Every Developer Would Love
item.description: Discover 10 innovative perks that would make a developer's job more enjoyable, from an official BRB clause to a headhunter defense spray.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Meta quietly leans on rival GPT-4 despite Zuckerberg’s bold Llama claims
item.description: Mark Zuckerberg has consistently championed Meta’s Llama AI model as a leader in generative AI technology, positioning it as a strong competitor to OpenAI and Google. However, behind the scenes, Meta is complementing Llama with a rival AI model to meet its internal needs.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 20 handy hidden tricks for Google Calendar on Android
item.description: Google Calendar is a core part of the Android productivity package — but if all you’re using is what you see on the app’s surface, you’re missing out on some pretty powerful possibilities. Yes, oh yes: Just like so many of our modern digital tools, there’s more to Google Calendar than meets the eye.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The UAE’s digital transformation: A visionary leap into the future
item.description: As the United Arab Emirates celebrates its 53rd National Day, it reflects on an extraordinary journey of transformation.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Intro to Express.js: Endpoints, parameters, and routes
item.description: Express.js is the most-used HTTP server and middleware platform for Node.js. Let’s take a hands-on look at what it brings to the table. Request handling with Express.js Handling requests over the Internet is one of the most frequent and common tasks in software development.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: AI Driving the future of UAE enterprises: 59% of business leaders plan to increase investment in advanced technologies
item.description: Innovation is naturally playing a key role in shaping the future enterprises, 59% of UAE business leaders say their investment in advanced technology will increase and 82% say that AI is already impacting what their organisation can achieve, while 45% state they will invest in advanced technologies
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Heroku PaaS adds .NET support
item.description: Meeting a longstanding request from users, Salesforce’s Heroku — one of the original platforms as a service (PaaS) — has unveiled official support for .NET development. Heroku also made its Heroku Next Generation Platform available in a pilot.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Microsoft hit with more litigation accusing it of predatory pricing
item.description: A UK law firm on Tuesday filed what amounts to a class-action lawsuit against Microsoft, accusing it of using its market share to overcharge clients running Windows Server on AWS, Google, or Alibaba cloud offerings instead of on Microsoft Azure.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Arista adds intelligent switch stacking, management for campus networks
item.description: Arista Networks is adding new features to its campus networking portfolio to help enterprise customers more easily group and manage switches.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: AT&T sees earnings growth over next 3 years; eyes more than $40B in anticipated shareholder returns
item.description: AT&T anticipates earnings growth over the next three years thanks to the momentum of 5G and fiber services.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE CHAPMAN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: AWS Database Migration Service gets gen AI-powered schema conversion
item.description: Amazon Web Services (AWS) has updated its Database Migration Service’s schema conversion feature with a new generative AI-powered capability that automates schema conversion to a great extent.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Linux fundamentals: Viewing files, commands, processes and systems
item.description: Linux provides a useful array of commands for managing file permissions, getting information on commands, displaying running processes and displaying details on the system itself.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Japans Panasonic Creates AI Version of Late Founder Kōnosuke Matsushita
item.description: Panasonic, the Japanese electronics company, has developed an AI version of its founder Kōnosuke Matsushita, who passed away in 1989. The AI will be trained on 3,000 recordings and writings of the late founder to provide insights for management decisions.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Canadian news publishers sue OpenAI over alleged copyright infringement
item.description: OTTAWA, Ontario (AP) — A coalition of Canadian news publishers, including The Canadian Press, Torstar, Globe and Mail, Postmedia and CBC/Radio-Canada, has filed a lawsuit against OpenAI for using news content to train its ChatGPT generative artificial intelligence system.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cryptocurrency entrepreneur who bought banana art for $6.2 million eats the fruit in Hong Kong
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — A cryptocurrency entrepreneur who bought a piece of conceptual art consisting of a simple banana, duct-taped to a wall, for $6.2 million last week ate the fruit in Hong Kong on Friday.
item.dc:creator: KANIS LEUNG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Siberia's 'Gateway to Hell' crater fuels new fears
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says the Batagaika crater in Siberia expands 35 million cubic feet yearly due to thawing.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
